events.name: He served as Governor of Wareham and looked after the baronial estates when his father
He overthrew Henry de Tracy at Castle Cary.
He made an alliance with Roger de Clare, 3rd Earl of Hertford, by which they agreed
He and his wife and son were captured by the Welsh Lord of Senghenydd, Ifor Bach

zh.lifeSummary: 當William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester於1116年11月23日出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利時，他的父親Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester26歲，母親Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester26歲。他於1150年與Hawise de Beaumont在英國萊希斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1183年11月23日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利享年67歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特凱斯哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester于1116年11月23日出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利时，他的父亲Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester26岁，母亲Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester26岁。他于1150年与Hawise de Beaumont在英国萊希斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1183年11月23日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利享年67岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特凱斯哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester was born on 23 November 1116, in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester, was 26 and his mother, Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester, was 26. He married Hawise de Beaumont in 1150, in Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He died on 23 November 1183, in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Keynsham, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester est né le 23 novembre 1116, à Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Hawise de Beaumont en 1150, à Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 23 novembre 1183, à Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Keynsham, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester am 23. November 1116 in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester 26 und seine Mutter Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester 26. Er hat 1150 in Leicestershire, England Hawise de Beaumont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 23. November 1183 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Keynsham, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester è nato il il 23 novembre 1116 nel Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Hawise de Beaumont nel 1150, nel Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì il 23 novembre 1183, nel Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Keynsham, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucesterが1116年11月23日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーで生まれた時，父Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucesterは26歳，母Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucesterは26歳であった。1150年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアでHawise de Beaumontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1183年11月23日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーで67歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトケインシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester(이)가 1116년 11월 23일 영국 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1150년 영국 레이스스터실르에서 Hawise de Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1183년 11월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 케이샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester nasceu em 23 de novembro de 1116, em Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Hawise de Beaumont em 1150, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de novembro de 1183, em Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Keynsham, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester родился 23 ноября 1116 г. в местности тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise de Beaumont в 1150 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Он умер 23 ноября 1183 г. в местности тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности киншам, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester nació el 23 de noviembre de 1116, en Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Hawise de Beaumont en 1150, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió el 23 de noviembre de 1183, en Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Keynsham, Somerset, Inglaterra.
